MINI MINUTES: Judge John Stewart; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mildred Quan is present.
Attorney Nils Rosenquest for the plaintiff.
Defendants Mona Borham and Ehab Elyyan are present.
Attorney Osama Hamdy appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 613, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of NOV-24-2014 remains on calendar. Judge John Stewart, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
